name: Danish Almond Ring
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 Ounces Almond Paste, broken in pieces
1 Can Pillsbury Crescent Dinner Rolls (8 Ounce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Grease a cookie sheet lightly.
3. In a small bowl, mix together sugar, margarine, and almond paste well using a fork.
4. Unroll the dough into two long rectangles and overlap the long sides to form one large rectangle. Firmly press the perforations to seal.
5. Press or roll out the rectangle to measure 16x8 inches. Cut lengthwise into three equal strips.
6. Place about 3 tablespoons of the filling mixture evenly down the center of each strip. Gently press the filling to form a 1-inch wide strip.
7. Overlap one side of the dough over the filling, and firmly pinch the edges to seal.
8. On an ungreased cookie sheet, loosely braid the three filled strips. Form the braid into a ring and pinch the ends together to seal.
9. Brush with beaten egg, sprinkle with sugar and sliced almonds.
10. Bake at 375 degrees for 15 to 22 minutes or until golden brown. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before removing from the cookie sheet. Serve warm.
